title: The Destiny of a Man
writer: Yuriy Lukin, Fyodor Shakhmagonov, Mikhail Sholokhov
actors: Sergey Bondarchuk, Pavel Boriskin, Zinaida Kirienko
plot: A Soviet soldier, Andrei Sokolov, has been separated from his family by World War II. Suffering in German captivity, he dreams of meeting his darlings after the victory. But cruel fate turned out otherwise.
